title: intensely dense spanish octopus paella
description: a traditional spanish dish originating from galicia, featuring caramelized octopus and a sweet caramel sauce, great as a main course or a festive celebration

ingredients.name: saffron
ingredients.notes: high-quality, Spanish saffron for authentic flavor

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large iron teppan over medium-high heat
add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring occasionally
add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
add the cannellini beans and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally
add the arborio rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly
add the chicken broth and bring to a boil
add the saffron and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
add the caramel sauce and stir to combine
add the cooked octopus and stir to combine
season with salt and black pepper to taste
garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately
